summary: Backend-only testing of RoamSync API. Created comprehensive pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_roamsync_api.py covering all 12 feature areas in the review request. All 25 tests PASSED (100%) including auth (register/login/me/profile), trips CRUD, invite code join (incl. already-member case), members RBAC, storage config, itinerary with start/stop and single-active-day enforcement, travel CRUD with passengers, expenses with all 4 split methods (equal/percentage/exact/shares) verified arithmetically, expense summary for both group and family trip types (family aggregation by family_head_id verified: admin paid 300 split 3 ways -> admin unit +200, member unit -200), transactions reducing balances in summary, media folders + base64 upload + emoji react toggle + uploader-only delete + uploader filter, dining sessions with item add/delete, tax/tip and per-person split (subtotal+tax+tip math validated), trip wrapped aggregated stats, and RBAC enforcement (viewer 403 on writes, member 403 on member-management and trip-delete, non-member 403 on trip access).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1037 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, trips, expenses, media, dining) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
EmailStr (pydantic) rejects .test/.local TLDs by design - keep using real-looking domains in clients/tests.

compute_splits uses round(amount/len, 2) for equal split which can introduce small rounding residue (e.g. 100/3). Acceptable but flagged - consider distributing the cent residue to one participant for exact balance closure.
Family trip unit_label defaults head name to 'Family' when pub cache miss; harmless given current flow.
No pagination on list endpoints (.to_list(500/1000/2000)) - fine for MVP but should be paginated when trips grow.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates 4 fresh users (test_admin_<uuid>@example.com etc.) and 2 trips (group + family). The TestZZ_Cleanup class deletes both trips at the end. Users remain but are uniquely-suffixed and prefixed 'test_' so they are easy to identify.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (note: not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.local/.example TLDs - use @example.com for test emails. All endpoints work via /api prefix. JWT issued by /api/auth/register and /api/auth/login (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Family trip aggregation: members.family_head_id groups dependents under the head; admin is its own unit unless its own family_head_id is set. Equal-split rounding uses 2dp per share which can leave small residue (verified within 0.05).
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Initial test failures were due to test-side email TLD '.test' being rejected by pydantic EmailStr (not a product bug). Fixed by switching to @example.com domain.
